title: AI is helping gas stations collude to raise California fuel prices, lawsuit says
description: A lawsuit accuses California gas station operators of using artificial intelligence software to illegally coordinate and drive up prices at the pump.
content:
article
A federal lawsuit alleges that AI software has permitted gas station operators in California to unlawfully collude and raise prices at the pump.

title: NMIMS Launches Horizon Initiative With Coursera To Equip 40,000 Students With AI Skills And Future-Ready Competencies
description: NMIMS has launched NMIMS Horizon, an AI skilling initiative in partnership with Coursera to equip nearly 40,000 students with future-ready competencies. The programme integrates artificial intelligence, machine learning and data analytics into academic curricula with structured assessments and faculty support.

title: Cycling industry turns to smart bikes to boost sales
description: At the Eurobike trade fair, hopes are high that smart and AI-enabled bicycles can revive an industry that has been dealing with years of flagging sales.
